reasoning: The control CP-10(5) focuses on system recovery and reconstitution with failover capabilities. In Kubernetes, ensuring system recovery and failover can be addressed through several mechanisms. 'k8s_etcd_backup_configured' ensures that etcd, the key-value store for Kubernetes, has backups configured, which is crucial for recovery. 'k8s_apiserver_high_availability_configured' ensures that the API server, a critical component, is set up for high availability. 'k8s_cluster_auto_scaling_enabled' ensures that the cluster can automatically adjust its size to handle failover scenarios. 'k8s_node_failover_configured' ensures that node-level failover mechanisms are in place to maintain application availability.
title: System Recovery And Reconstitution - System recovery and reconstitution | failover capability [withdrawn
